commands.review_summary:
The PR marks native alias command specs, prioritizes canonical Telegram menu commands before aliases, strips alias markers before `setMyCommands`, and adds targeted registry/menu tests plus a changelog entry.

PR surface: Source +14, Tests +40, Docs 0. Total +54 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main expands `nativeAliases` into the same native command list and slices the first 100 Telegram menu entries without alias awareness. I did not run a live Telegram bot repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Human handling is needed because current-head proof is stale and the PR changes a public Plugin SDK type; automation cannot supply contributor proof or choose the SDK contract direction.
